label: About
title: About Glazed Edge Habitat
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 92 recent saved-signal files and 78 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around @compositioning: Drawings by Jans Muskee (2014-2025) and Anchor image material 3, plus 7 more. A source image from sidsaladi.substack.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Glazed Edge Habitat: Glazed Edge Habitat: a game-space surface in shallow macro, not a room. One large matte paper-glaze terrain carries branching navmesh seams; a smaller collision cluster interrupts it with cuts, chipped labels, glossy defects, and embedded media grains. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against large matte routed slab, orange glazed rectangular aperture, and central blue route-junction pool.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
